column41: Jun 5: Wetherholt (lower body) remains out of the lineup for Friday's game against the Reds.
Jun 5: Muncy passed concussion testing Thursday and has been diagnosed with a sore nose, but he will not play Friday against the Angels, Bob Nightengale of USA Today reports.
